Whether you're coming from out of town or you're a local, reserve your parking space in a spacious and conveniently located area (in front of Super One) to watch the parade and have your car nearby. Call 318.230.4482 (English) to secure your spot – spaces start from $15 dollars depending on the size. Bring your tent food, and drinks and welcome your friends in this space. Cheers call now a few spaces left 318.230.4482
he Krewe of Centaur is one of the largest parading krewes in Louisiana, and their giant, colorful parade is a must-see! The parade will begin, rain or shine, at 3 PM on Saturday, February 3 starting at Clyde Fant Parkway in downtown Shreveport. The massive parade proceeds along Shreveport’s parade route, which follows Clyde Fant Parkway south from downtown Shreveport, turns right onto Shreveport-Barksdale Highway and ends in the Broadmoor neighborhood at East Kings Highway Park. The parade includes dozens of huge, colorful floats, marching bands, dance troupes and more.
